name: Between Mice and Slime - Lorna/Damm (Terrible Mouse)
description:
[Human POV]

[Based on Terrible Mouse - Episode 3]

After coming across the mysterious hospital, you accidentally get caught up in the middle of the chaos at the hospital's underground boxing ring, and ends up being taken hostage alongside Damn, with Lorna taking it upon herself to handle your 'interrogation'...

One long torture section at Lorna's bedroom later, and the mouse nurse decides to call it a night, going to bed and leaving you and Damm there, bond in your respective chairs, as you wonder how you could possibly escape this predicament alive...

=====X=====

Artist: churroo711
creator: CrimsonMonarch
